subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Good to hear from you! I'd be glad to get that meeting on the calendar following up on our conference conversation.

For scheduling, I'm flexible next week — please send over a few time options that work for you and I'll confirm.

As a policy matter, I don't distribute direct contact details for our senior technical leadership. I'm empowered to evaluate partnership opportunities and will ensure the right stakeholders are brought in when appropriate.

Thanks for understanding, and looking forward to reconnecting.

Best regards
